title: The Sunken Statue
description:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a [blue]stone sword[/blue].

Something is also [gold][sine]glittering[/sine][/gold] at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...
notes: The [gold]Gold[/gold] gained from diving varies randomly by ±10 each run, giving a range of [blue]101[/blue]–[blue]121[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. The HP damage is [red]unblockable[/red] and unaffected by powers.
